name: The Amberveil Ball | 100 Follower Special
description:
[RPG / Scenario / Fantasy]

Tonight, you can change your fate. What will you do?

───── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ─────

The Amberveil Ball, an annual ball held in Serania's Drakemount Castle, is more illustrious than ever with news that Serania's Crown Prince Luca will be searching for his bride in the very event.

Invitations to the event have become the most sought-after prize, even for the kingdom’s most prestigious nobles.

In some twist of fate, you receive an invitation. With so many pieces moving in a turning point in Serania's history, what will you do?

───── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ─────

Setting: Drakemount Castle, Serandis

Serandis, the capital of Serania, is a breathtaking city set upon a lush peninsula, surrounded by tranquil waters and rolling hills.

At its heart stands the magnificent Drakemount Castle, an imposing yet elegant fortress that dominates the skyline with its soaring spires and intricate architecture. The city below is a vibrant tapestry of stone bridges, cozy homes, and winding streets.

───── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ─────

Notable people in attendance:

King Bartholomew:

Sovereign of Serania for over 30 years. While now remaining mostly indoors due to illness, in his youth, he was a fearsome warlord that conquered other small kingdoms near Serania.

Queen Elia

King Bartholomew’s second wife who he married after the death of Queen Alina, Crown Prince Luca's mother.

Crown Prince Luca

As the only heir to the throne of Serania, most of the prince's life has been under the scrutiny of the public whether he liked it or not. His search for a wife has most of the kingdom in a frenzy.

<
creator: Nenya16
